---
format: html
title: get_functional_type_classification()
---

<html><head>
<meta http-equiv="Content-Type" content="text/html; charset=utf-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, user-scalable=yes" />
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/katex@0.15.3/dist/katex.min.css">
<script type="text/javascript">
const macros = { "\\R": "\\textsf{R}", "\\mbox": "\\text", "\\code": "\\texttt"};
function processMathHTML() {
    var l = document.getElementsByClassName('reqn');
    for (let e of l) { katex.render(e.textContent, e, { throwOnError: false, macros }); }
    return;
}</script>
<script defer src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/katex@0.15.3/dist/katex.min.js"
    onload="processMathHTML();"></script>
<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="R.css" />
</head><body><div class="container"><main>

<table style="width: 100%;"><tr><td>get_functional_type_classification</td><td style="text-align: right;">R Documentation</td></tr></table>

<h2>Get Functional-Type Classification for a Continental Unit</h2>

<h3>Description</h3>

<p>Loads the most recent FT classification file for a given
continental unit from 'Data/Processed/Traits/'. The file is
produced by 'pipe_segment_traits_ft_clustering' in
'pipeline_traits_reference.R' and named
'data_ft_classification_continent_id_YYYY-MM-DD.qs'.
</p>


<h3>Usage</h3>

<pre><code class='language-R'>get_functional_type_classification(
  continent_id,
  path_processed = here::here("Data/Processed/Traits")
)
</code></pre>


<h3>Arguments</h3>

<table role = "presentation">
<tr><td><code id="continent_id">continent_id</code></td>
<td>
<p>A single non-empty character string identifying the continental
unit (e.g. '&quot;europe&quot;', '&quot;america&quot;', '&quot;asia&quot;'). Must match exactly
with the 'scale_id' used when the FT classification was saved.</p>
</td></tr>
<tr><td><code id="path_processed">path_processed</code></td>
<td>
<p>A single character string giving the directory that contains the
FT classification '.qs' files. Default:
'here::here(&quot;Data/Processed/Traits&quot;)'.</p>
</td></tr>
</table>


<h3>Details</h3>

<p>The function delegates path selection to
[get_functional_type_classification_path()] and file loading to
[read_functional_type_classification()].
</p>


<h3>Value</h3>

<p>A tibble with two columns:
</p>

<dl>
<dt>taxon_name</dt><dd><p>Character. Taxon names resolved to finest
available rank, matching the 'taxon_name' column in the
global trait table.</p>
</dd>
<dt>functional_type</dt><dd><p>Integer. Cluster label
(1..'number_of_ft_groups') assigned for this
continental unit.</p>
</dd>
</dl>



<h3>See Also</h3>

<p>[cluster_functional_types()],
[get_functional_type_classification_path()],
[read_functional_type_classification()]
</p>

</main>

</div>
</body></html>
